reasoning_content: We need to determine if 359 is prime. Check divisibility: sqrt(359) ≈ 18.95. Test primes up to 19: 2: no, odd. 3: sum digits 3+5+9=17, not divisible by 3. 5: last digit not 0 or 5. 7: 7*51=357, remainder 2, not divisible. 11: 11*32=352, remainder 7. 13: 13*27=351, remainder 8. 17: 17*21=357, remainder 2. 19: 19*18=342, remainder 17. So no divisors. Hence 359 is prime. Answer: yes.
